name: augnes-codex
description: Packages the Augnes Codex Skill for guided setup and reuse onboarding with Augnes memory/reuse/context in Codex.

interface.shortDescription: Guide Augnes setup, English/Korean triggers, /hooks trust, and memory reuse fallback in Codex.
interface.longDescription: Packages the Augnes Codex Skill v0.1 for guided setup and reuse onboarding. Guides Codex through English and Korean Augnes install/use triggers, installer dry-run, explicit --yes install, user-liftable default constraints, non-liftable /hooks trust review, and memory-reuse fallback. Hook trust remains manual; installing this plugin does not write to ~/.codex, bundle hooks, or add MCP, provider/model, storage, persistence, Codex SDK, GitHub mutation, or automatic memory item creation behavior.
defaultPrompt: Review this PR with Augnes context
